prompt:
Goal: Create a high-resolution photorealistic luxury AI branding poster featuring a confident fashion-forward woman in a dreamy pastel futuristic environment.

Canvas: Vertical 3:4 poster, cinematic wide-angle view from slightly above, ultra-polished commercial advertising quality, soft pastel palette, glossy glass reflections, volumetric clouds, glowing holograms, no black borders.

Main subject: A glamorous young woman named Hania stands confidently near the front edge of a transparent floating glass platform above soft clouds. She has long flowing dark brown hair, soft glamorous makeup, elegant pearl jewelry, and a poised influencer/CEO posture. Her face should be intentionally softly obscured or blurred for privacy while the rest of the image remains sharp. She wears a cream tailored pantsuit with mint inner top and peach pocket accents, white pointed heels, layered necklaces, and small earrings. One hand touches her hair or sunglasses near her temple; the other holds a transparent glowing tablet displaying minimal AI interface graphics.

Layout: Place the woman centered foreground, full body visible. Behind her, create giant translucent 3D glowing letters spelling HANIA AI, with the first word across the upper background and the second word large behind her lower torso. The letters are pastel cyan, peach, lavender, and mint, with luminous edges and glass-like material. Build the scene as a futuristic floating social-media control deck with rounded platforms, soft clouds below, and minimal sci-fi architectural elements on the right.

Discrete visible elements to include: exactly 1 central woman; exactly 2 rows of giant headline letters, reading “HANIA” on the top row and “AI” on the lower row; exactly 1 transparent tablet in her hand; exactly 1 large curved quote panel on the right; exactly 1 front-left branding panel; exactly 1 front-right social-media panel; exactly 2 wireframe globe graphics; exactly 2 small floating translucent UI cards on the left; exactly 1 large rounded rectangular HUD frame behind the left side of the headline; exactly 1 futuristic column-and-canopy structure in the upper-right background.

Text content: The giant background headline reads HANIA AI. The curved translucent quote panel on the right reads Create trends, don’t follow them.. The front-left floating panel reads “AI HANIA” with a circular AI icon. The front-right panel title reads “SOCIAL MEDIA” and includes exactly 4 small social icons underneath. Keep text clean, bold, white or softly glowing, and legible.

Visual style: Fresh pastel luxury aesthetic, cinematic art direction, photorealistic fashion editorial mixed with futuristic UI design. Use glassmorphism, translucent acrylic surfaces, glowing neon outlines, subtle bokeh particles, soft sunrise sky gradients, pearlescent highlights, and gentle reflections on the platform. Color palette should emphasize mint, lavender, peach, powder blue, and warm cream.

Constraints: Do not add extra people, extra headline words, cluttered text, watermarks, or logos beyond the specified brand panels. Keep the composition airy, aspirational, premium, and social-media-ready, with sharp clothing details and intentionally blurred facial identity.
